attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-ID-01-00204) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-ID-01 bucket via ingest --reseq.
Specialty set to ID (Infectious Disease) — the metadata specialty enum has no ENT/GP; primary tag ID. Reclassify if the maintainer prefers a different primary.
Age (35) has NO source signal — filled to satisfy the required demographics.age field; confirm on clinician review.
Sex_at_birth (female) has NO source signal — filled to satisfy the required demographics.sex_at_birth field; confirm on clinician review.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source note is an in-person home visit (oropharyngeal exam, vitals, clinician-administered oral analgesia). Exam findings and vitals were sealed into 10/11; the AI-appropriate action is red-flag screening + analgesia-first self-care + conditional in-person escalation.
Presentation layer de-anchored: the source note's clinician conclusion (specific viral diagnosis and ruled-out differentials) was removed from 01/02, which carry only lay symptoms and worries.

Tier calibrated LOW (baseline T2, minimum viable pass T1) deliberately: uncomplicated viral pharyngitis is telehealth/self-care manageable; airway and suppurative red flags were screened negative, so ED/000 would be over-triage. The narrow uplift above pure self-care reflects inability to maintain oral intake plus living alone.
No dose invented beyond the source: paracetamol/ibuprofen/benzydamine doses reflect standard adult OTC ranges consistent with the note; adult patient, so no paediatric dosing question arises.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
